name: @wxyc/artist-search-alias-consumer
description: WXYC daily ETL: consume LML's POST /api/v1/artists/search-aliases/bulk and UPSERT variants into artist_search_alias (migration 0089). Shadow-ingests library.alternate_artist_name as the wxyc_library_alt source. Populates the cache the catalog search's alias-aware LATERAL JOIN reads from (BS#1266 / artist-search-alias plan PR 4).
